reapack.name: ReaRanger_fA.lua
reapack.desc: ReaRanger fA - Realtime Region List Editor

version.author: foxAsteria
version.changelog:
v0.7.21 — Title-bar app-name recolored to window bg grey for readability.
v0.7.20 — Fix stale title-bar version label (window hardcoded "v0.7.15").
v0.7.19 — Ship release. Realtime region-list editor / lite arranger: - Reorder regions (list or lane) and the media content moves with them (ripple). - Insert gaps (single-click +Gap, double-click to type exact length). - Per-digit time drag (grab minutes / seconds / ms independently; Ctrl = fine). - Lane drag to reorder, drag edges to resize; beats/time toggle. - In-place rename (double-click), custom color picker per region. Requires ReaImGui (install via ReaPack: ReaTeam Extensions).

metadata.description:
ReaRanger fA is a lightweight region-list arranger for REAPER. It shows your project regions as an editable list plus an overview lane; reordering a region physically moves the media items under it (ripple), inserting a gap opens silence and slides later audio right. Per-digit time dragging, in-place rename, custom per-region colors, and a beats/time display toggle. Built by foxAsteria with Claude.
Requires the ReaImGui extension (install via ReaPack from the ReaTeam Extensions repository).
